nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 䳍科
nodes.summary: 䳍科（Tinamidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联46种鸟类，如北山䳍、南山䳍、棕凤头䳍等46种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 巴西
nodes.summary: 巴西是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联854种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、侏䳍、白腹拟䳍等854种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 侏䳍
nodes.summary: 侏䳍（Dwarf tinamou，学名 Taoniscus nanus），分类上属于Tinamiformes，并归入䳍科，在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要分布于巴西，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、农药污染。

nodes.name: Tinamiformes
nodes.summary: Tinamiformes（Tinamiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联46种鸟类，如北山䳍、南山䳍、棕凤头䳍等46种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The dwarf tinamou is found in the arid scrub grasslands, around in elevation, restricted to the Cerrado region of interior southeastern BrazilClements, J

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The dwarf tinamou is found in the arid scrub grasslands, around in elevation, restricted to the Cerrado region of interior southeastern BrazilClements, J

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The dwarf tinamou is currently threatened by the ongoing habitat loss caused by mechanised agriculture, intensive cattle-ranching, afforestation, invasive grasses, excessive use of pesticides and annual burning

links.evidence: The dwarf tinamou is currently threatened by the ongoing habitat loss caused by mechanised agriculture, intensive cattle-ranching, afforestation, invasive grasses, excessive use of pesticides and annual burning
